title: Pac-Man Search Agents
description: Python agents that navigate and play Pac-Man using classical search algorithms â€” depth-first, breadth-first, uniform cost, and A*. Each strategy is implemented against the Berkeley Pac-Man framework, with multiple layouts and agent types (reflex, greedy, heuristic) used to test pathfinding quality and efficiency.
shortDescription: Pac-Man agents using DFS, BFS, UCS, and A* search strategies.
